(15) anger, (16) dancing, (17) drinking ghee, (18) sleeping, (19)
giving gifts, (20) tooth-ache, (21) quarrel, (22) journey, (23)
lunacy, (24) swimming in or crossing water, (25) hostility, (26)
an enjoyable bath, (27) hunger, (28) fear, (29) acquisition of
Sastraic knowledge, (30) wantonness, (31) assembly, (32) fighting,
(33) doing meritorious deeds, (34) committing sins, (35) perpetrat-
ing cruel deeds, and (36) great joy. These three kinds of the
Moon's strength can be used with advantage.
Now we have to understand the vulnerable degrees in each
sign of the zodiac for the planets. The following table gives the
